falsification_conditions.condition: The price closes above the 200-day moving average by 5% or more
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear bullish breakout would contradict the HOLD signal and indicate a trend reversal invalidating the current verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume exceeds the 90th percentile of the past year's daily volume
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volume would signal a high-probability breakout or blowoff, directly contradicting the HOLD and 83% pattern similarity to a bottom.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 14-day RSI crosses above 70 and stays above for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Overbought conditions with confirmation would invalidate the HOLD by indicating a potential blowoff top rather than a continuation pattern.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
